title: Broadcast Tower Story Forge
topic: verified achievements, event records, and public-safe stories
skill_description: Turn verified town achievements and consented evidence into public-safe story drafts with reviewable claims.
review_reason: keeper reviews consent, accuracy, public value, tone, and claim support before publication
quality_rules: Every story angle must link to verified evidence or clearly request more evidence.
Consent and redaction state must be explicit.
Do not turn operational activity into public success without substantive outcome proof.
skill_rules: Prefer specific public value over promotional copy.
Return unsupported claims to evidence collection or review.

participants.title: Achievement Signals Desk
participants.perspective: A public story needs a real achievement, not just task logs.
participants.current_question: Which achievement is verified enough to tell publicly?
participants.contribution: Provides outcome evidence, source pages, people involved, and uncertainty.

participants.title: Redaction Review Desk
participants.perspective: Public stories should be safe for residents, teams, and civic partners.
participants.current_question: Which detail needs consent, redaction, or removal?
participants.contribution: Provides consent status, redaction needs, and risky claims.

participants.title: Public Story Draft Desk
participants.perspective: A story should explain what changed, why it matters, and what happens next.
participants.current_question: Which story form best serves the public without overclaiming?
participants.contribution: Provides story angle, audience, claim list, and next publication artifact.
